name: iksula-agents
description: Iksula's agentic-org skills across the Product/Offering and Commercial streams: vertical-process-mapping, solutions-architect-create, research-solutions, client-research, thought-leadership, content-creator, media-planner, growth-hacker, lead-gen, and pranaam — the session bootstrap that connects a Claude instance to the shared Brain. Researches named accounts and the people you pitch to, productizes diagnosed opportunities into sellable solutions, and runs coordinated, multi-channel content, distribution, demand capture and qualification — all reading and writing the shared Brain.
